Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: E.J. and Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello helps create New England eats.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Tailgate Houston-style: grilled jalapeno poppers, chili con queso, and ancho-rubbed flap steak.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups: Cuban black bean soup, tortilla soup, and French onion soup topped with bubbling Gruyere cheese
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril and Lindsey Brower and Nan Wallis create a meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter prepare classic down-home dishes.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Cheesesteak Po Boy, Oyster Po Boy
Video.title: Po Boys

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Country Ham with Redeye Gravy and Buttermilk Biscuits; Country Ham and Apple Slaw with Baby Swiss and Bourbon Mustard; Frozen Mint Julep
Video.title: Country Ham Show

Video.summary: Emeril and Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Nuoc Cham Dipping Sauce, Carrot Salad, Vegetable Platter, Spring Rolls, Sweet Rice with Meat, Shrimp and Sausage
Video.title: Vietnamese

Video.summary: Cream of Porcini Soup with Quail Eggs; Veal Scallopine with Madeira and Porcini Mushrooms; Fresh Porcini Salad
Video.title: Porcinis

Video.summary: Win over everyone with Emeril's easy crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Herbed Pan Roast of Salmon with Warm Greens and Herb Vinaigrette; Focaccia with Savory and Olives; Tarragon Chicken Salad; Cilantro-Avocado Potato Salad; Mint Julep Sorbet
Video.title: Emeril's Herb Garden

Video.summary: Greek-Style Stuffed Artichokes with Greek Lemon Sauce, Roasted Tomatoes with Angel Hair, Corn Pudding, Grilled Lamb Chops with Herb Jelly, Watermelon Ice
Video.title: Emeril's Farm Stand

Video.summary: Venison Terrine; Tex-Mex-Style Venison Chili; Italian-Style Venison Stew with Egg Noodles; Grilled Venison with Braised Red Cabbage and Mashed Potatoes
Video.title: Kicked-Up Venison

Video.summary: Mini-Eggs Benedict with Choron Sauce; Steak and Potato Bites; Cheese and Sausage Lasagna Bites; Emeril's Crawfish-Cream Pasta Bites
Video.title: Small Dishes

Video.summary: Garlic Studded Pot Roast, North African Lamb Shanks with Couscous, Spiced Baked Ham with Sweet Potatoes
Video.title: Dutch Oven Cooking

Video.summary: They're staple recipes on many backroad kitchen tables: Stuffed Eggplant Pirogues; Brisket-Stuffed with Cornbread; Old-Time Corn Soup with Sausage
Video.title: Louisiana Backroads

Video.title: Quail
